message:
fix(api): length-prefix receipt hash in fleet_quarantine to prevent delimiter collision

build_receipt() used colon-delimited format!() for hash payload, allowing
collision when field values contain colons (e.g., timestamps, URIs). Switch
to length-prefixed encoding with per-field hasher.update() calls. Remove
now-unused receipt_payload_hash() helper.

Closes bd-3r4o

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
